LAW AND MOTION 301, JAN-23-20626 RE: DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF MEHMEZ YILDIZ'S FURTHER VERIFIED SUBSTANTIVE AND COMPLETE RESPONSES TO DEFENDANT'S FORM INTERROGATORIES SET 1, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES SET 1 AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS SET 1; REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS. THE MATTER IS ARGUED. AT THE CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS' MOTION IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING. COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT IS INSTRUCTED TO SUBMIT TO DEPT. 301 A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH TRACKS THE COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING VERBATIM. THE PRECEDING SHOULD COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (301/CVA)
